title: Conditional Formatting for "Last Updated" column on WM Portfolio board

posts.author: mgarza (Max Sequeira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

On Monday Work Management, on the “Portfolio” project management board, I have created a new column to reflect the Last Update made to each project included in the board. It delivers a perfect format for the value expected, including the owner the last update made which is awesome.

What I would like to know now is how to setup an Color Coding automation that creates a background color update based on timeframed rules I define. As an example, lets say we think of the following rules:

  • Green bkg color if updated within the last 24:00:00 hours
  • Yellow bkg color if updated within 48:00:00 hours and 23:59:00 hours
  • Red bkg color if updated within a period beyond 48:00:00 hours

I am aware this is easily possible to setup on CRM going to the 3dot of the board and creating Color Conditions for any particular column, but weirdly this seems to not be available on Work Management boards. Any ideas on whethere there is a work around or if its in the development Roadmap would be very much appreciated.

All the best!
Max
